risks.title: Over-broad exclusion pattern
risks.mitigation: Use specific filename patterns (*.min.js, workbox-*.js, content-hash patterns) not blanket public/ dir exclusion

risks.title: Hand-authored JS in public/ mistakenly excluded
risks.mitigation: Patterns target minified/hashed bundle naming conventions, not the public/ directory itself

risks.title: Scanner and pipeline ignore patterns diverge
risks.mitigation: Update both DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS (scanner.ts) and DEFAULT_PIPELINE_IGNORE_PATTERNS (ignore-rules.ts) in same commit

decision_records.decision: Target convention-based filename patterns, not public/ directory exclusion
decision_records.rationale: Dispatch constraint: must not exclude hand-authored JS in public/. Minified bundles are identified by naming convention (*.min.js, workbox-*.js, content-hashed filenames like workbox-4754cb34.js)
The pipeline orchestrator path uses ignore-rules.ts; the scan CLI path uses scanner.ts. Both must exclude minified bundles or the fix is partial — populate fixes but scan re-indexes them on next run.
